widgets_values:
# LTXV-2 Model Files & Dependencies

## Diffusion Model
**LTXV-2 DEV GGUF - download the quant you prefer - Q8 is best**

*Place in:* `diffusion_models`

- [QuantStack/LTX-2-GGUF](https://huggingface.co/QuantStack/LTX-2-GGUF/tree/main/LTX-2-dev)

---

## Distilled LoRA
**LTX-2 19B DISTILLED LORA**  
*Place in:* `loras`

- [ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/resolve/main/loras/ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora_resized_dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_175_fp8.safetensors)

---

## Text Encoder
**Gemma 3 12B (FP4 mixed)**  
*Place in:* `clip`

- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)

---

## Dual CLIP Connector
**LTX-2 Embeddings Connector (bf16)**  
*Place in:* `clip`

- [ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/resolve/main/text_encoders/ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors)

---

## Audio & Video VAE
**LTX-2 VAE Files**  
*Place in:* `vae`

- [LTX-2 VAE Folder](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/tree/main/VAE)

---

## Spatial Upscaler
**LTX-2 Spatial Upscaler ×2 (v1.0)**  
*Place in:* `latent_upscale_models`

- [ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/blob/main/ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)

---

## Tiny VAE for previews
**LTX-2 Tiny VAE**  
*Place in:* `vae approx`

- [taeltx_2.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/VAE/taeltx_2.safetensors)
## - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) — Install or update this node pack to get the Audio VAE node

# LTX Studio Documentation

- [Prompting Guide for LTX-2](https://docs.ltx.video/api-documentation/prompting-guide)
- [How To Prompt Realistic People](https://ltx.studio/blog/how-to-prompt-realistic-looking-people)

nodes.title: Performance
widgets_values: RTX 5060 Ti + 64GB RAM can push to 1080p for 20 seconds.

The shot starts with a side on ultra close up and dollies out to a close up amateur handheld shot of a woman. She is lying in bed with her head on a pillow smiling as she poses for the camera in a quiet room. She says in a calm, loving tone "Imagine where we'll be two workflows from now"

nodes.title: Sample Prompts
widgets_values:
# 15 seconds

The shot starts with a side on ultra close up and dollies out to a close up amateur handheld shot of a woman. She is lying in bed with her head on a pillow smiling as she poses for the camera in a quiet room. She says "I'm so fucking excited about this new workflow, I think I'm gonna jizz my pants!" She calms down and says "But..." then sighs, and pauses briefly slowly says "I don't want to get mine dirty so...", she pauses again briefly and breaking into a cheeky smile before jokingly saying "...can I jizz yours instead?". Low contrast, film grain, muted cinematic lighting.

# 10 seconds

An intimate close-up shot frames a bald Black man with a neatly trimmed goatee, seated in a quiet, dimly lit room with a soft, muted color palette and smooth natural shadows across his face. The scene is still and uncluttered, with a silent atmosphere that keeps full attention on his expression and voice. He looks directly into the camera with steady, unwavering eye contact, his face calm but visibly carrying emotional weight in the slight tension around his eyes and mouth. The camera remains mostly static with a subtle handheld drift, creating a natural, personal feeling as if he is speaking directly to the viewer. In a low, sincere, reassuring voice, he says, “So listen..." then pauses briefly before saying "a spot has opened up on the team, and I want you to apply...” He pauses slightly after speaking then he says "I think you'd do a great job". 

# 5 seconds

The shot starts with a side on ultra close up and dollies out to a close up amateur handheld shot of a woman. She is lying in bed with her head on a pillow smiling as she poses for the camera in a quiet room. She says in a calm, loving tone "Imagine where we'll be two workflows from now"

nodes.title: LoRAs
widgets_values:
# Loading LoRAs

LoRAs are loaded with this custom node:

[https://github.com/seanhan19911990-source/LTX2-Master-Loader](https://github.com/seanhan19911990-source/LTX2-Master-Loader)

This node allows you to disable the sound for LoRAs that you don't want affecting the sound. 

Alternatively "LTX2 LoRA Loader Advanced" from [https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) can be used to accomplish this too.

# Camera Control LoRAs

Official camera control LoRAs can be downloaded from: [https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/models](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/models)

nodes.title: Frame Rate Note
widgets_values: It has to be a multiple of 8 + 1, that's the reason for using 24 fps rather than the standard 25.

nodes.title: custom node
widgets_values: [https://github.com/evanspearman/ComfyMath](https://github.com/evanspearman/ComfyMath) use to automatically calculate the number of frames based on the framerate and number of seconds. Convenient so that you don't have to keep manually adjusting it. Instead just select how many seconds you want to generate for.

Both the in-built ComfyUI "VAE Decode (Tiled)" node and this LTXV Spatio Temporal Tiled VAE Decode node work to do the decode. They have different trade-offs. "VAE Decode (Tiled)" decodes over all frames, making longer videos require smaller/more tiles, which can require manual adjustment to not OOM. The spatio temporal tiled VAE decode is a bit slower, but requires less manual tweaking of values to hit max length at max resolution.

# Audio Enhancer Nodes

[https://github.com/Urabewe/ComfyUI-AudioTools](https://github.com/Urabewe/ComfyUI-AudioTools)

Audio is a bit trash in LTX-2, so this helps clean it up.

This is no longer necessary in LTX-2.3, but for LTX-2 it definitely helps.
